note: As-is baseline (before) of the board render path this change touches: viewBoard → renderNeedsYouStrip ('⏸ NEEDS YOU (N)' box, fed by gates()/gateFor + phaseBar + the 1..9 number keys) → renderColumn x4 → renderCard row3 = status pill + phase dots ①②③④⑤ (phaseProgress vector). colAvail() subtracts stripHeight(). Scoped to exactly what the change removes/reworks.

diagrams.title: Current board render flow (before): needs-you strip + number-key answering + per-card phase dots; colAvail subtracts stripHeight
